commands.repair_reason: No automated repair is needed; this maintainer-authored draft needs normal maintainer readiness and merge handling.; Cleared: The diff only changes provider-local request-option normalization and tests; it does not add dependencies, workflows, credentials handling, or new code-execution paths. commands.review_summary:
The PR normalizes native Ollama chat payloads so temperature-0 requests with configured top_p below 1 send top_p: 1, with focused runtime and live-test expectation updates.

PR surface: Source +10, Tests +74. Total +84 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level. Current main forwards model params top_p 0.9 with stream temperature 0 into the native Ollama request, and the PR body supplies the live Ollama Cloud path that exercises the rejected combination.
